OnboardingPage.description: Select your photography interests so we can provide you with the best experience.
OnboardingPage.analysis_subtitle: Luma needs to know you to be the best coach.

device_type.text: What device do you use to take photos?

interest.text: What do you photograph the most?

approach.text: What do you pay the most attention to when taking photos?

AcademyPage.main_description: Take your photography knowledge from the basics to mastery.
AcademyPage.level_basic_description: Learn the basics of your camera, understand exposure, and master the fundamental composition rules.
AcademyPage.level_intermediate_description: Shoot in different styles, apply advanced techniques, and consciously manage light.
AcademyPage.level_advanced_description: Create your artistic style, learn professional lighting setups, and specialize in photography.
AcademyPage.tooltip_intermediate: Intermediate Level — Keep progressing, unlock the key.
AcademyPage.tooltip_advanced: Expert content for Advanced Level. Continue your development to unlock it.
AcademyPage.journey_desc: Each level is specially designed for you to specialize in photography. Earn XP by completing lessons and level up.

AcademyLevelPage.practice_submission_description: Upload the photo you took for this assignment and get instant feedback.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_file_size_description: Please upload an image file smaller than 10MB.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_analysis_start_description: Feedback specific to your assignment is being prepared.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_upload_fail_description: Your photo could not be stored. Please try again.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_feedback_ready_description: You can see the result below.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_analysis_fail_description: An error occurred while generating AI feedback.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_reward_description: You've earned {xp} XP and {auro} Auro from this lesson.
AcademyLevelPage.toast_mentor_description: Congratulations! You can now mentor as a Vexer.
AcademyLevelPage.invalid_level_description: The educational level you are looking for could not be found.
AcademyLevelPage.no_lessons_title: No Lessons Available at This Level
AcademyLevelPage.no_lessons_description: Create lessons for this level using the admin tool from the profile page.

CompetitionsPage.title: Competitions
CompetitionsPage.coming_soon_description: General competitions organized by Viewora will be displayed in this area.
CompetitionsPage.no_competitions_description: New competitions will be here soon. Stay tuned!

DashboardPage.main_title: I am Luma. I'm accompanying you on your photography journey.
DashboardPage.greeting_desc_1: We will improve your photos together.
DashboardPage.greeting_desc_2: I analyze light, composition, and technical details. I highlight your strengths and clearly point out your weaknesses.
DashboardPage.greeting_cta: Hello {name}. If you're ready, upload your first photo.
DashboardPage.upload_prompt_main: Click or drag and drop to upload
DashboardPage.toast_invalid_file_description: Please upload an image file (e.g., JPG, PNG).
DashboardPage.toast_upload_only_description: Your photo has been added to the gallery. You can analyze it anytime.
DashboardPage.toast_upload_fail_description: Your photo could not be stored. Please check your Firebase Storage rules.
DashboardPage.toast_db_fail_description: Your photo could not be saved to the database. Please try again.
DashboardPage.toast_analysis_fail_description: AI analysis failed. The photo has been added to your gallery, you can try again from there.
DashboardPage.toast_bonus_description: You earned +{xp} bonus XP for high score!
DashboardPage.toast_mentor_description: Congratulations! You can now mentor as a Vexer.
DashboardPage.state_wait: This process may take some time, please wait.
DashboardPage.no_strengths: No particularly prominent strengths were found in this photo, but it's a generally balanced shot.
DashboardPage.platform_title: WHAT YOU CAN DO WITH VIEWORA
DashboardPage.platform_card_1_desc: Upload your photo. Let AI analyze light, composition, and story power.
DashboardPage.platform_card_2_desc: Improve your photography knowledge with lessons prepared for your level.
DashboardPage.platform_card_3_desc: Join global competitions, show your works to the world in thematic exhibitions.
DashboardPage.platform_card_4_desc: Meet other artists, join private groups, and learn together.
DashboardPage.platform_card_5_desc: Your photography growth coach. Get personal feedback and improvement suggestions.
DashboardPage.platform_footer: A GLOBAL MOBILE PHOTOGRAPHY AND AI PLATFORM DEVELOPED IN TÜRKİYE.

ExplorePage.title: Exhibition Hall
ExplorePage.description: Discover exhibits, competitions, and photography communities.
ExplorePage.loading_analysis: Loading detailed AI analysis for this photo...
ExplorePage.no_photos_title: No one has shared their work yet
ExplorePage.no_photos_description: Revitalize this space by submitting a photo from your own gallery to the Exhibition!
ExplorePage.category_exhibitions_features: 25 ACTIVE EXHIBITIONS, NEW THEMES EVERY WEEK
ExplorePage.category_competitions_desc: Compete with your photos and win awards.
ExplorePage.category_competitions_features: 3 ACTIVE COMPETITIONS, JURY AND COMMUNITY VOTING
ExplorePage.category_groups_desc: Join photography communities and receive feedback.
ExplorePage.category_featured_desc: The best photos from the community.

GalleryPage.title: My Gallery
GalleryPage.toast_foyer_limit_reached: Foyer limit (10 photos) has been reached.
GalleryPage.toast_error_foyer: An error occurred during foyer operation.
GalleryPage.camera_info_ai: This image is generated by Artificial Intelligence
GalleryPage.toast_delete_complete: Your photo has been permanently deleted from the gallery.
GalleryPage.alert_dialog_delete_description: This photo will be permanently deleted from your gallery and from the Exhibition (if added). This action cannot be undone.
GalleryPage.no_photos_filtered_description: Select a different tag or use the "All" filter to see all your photos.
GalleryPage.no_photos_title: No Photos in Your Gallery Yet
GalleryPage.no_photos_description: Fill your gallery by doing your first analysis with the AI coach!
GalleryPage.toast_submit_exhibition_complete: Your photo has been submitted to the Exhibition.
GalleryPage.toast_withdraw_exhibition_complete: Your photo has been withdrawn from the Exhibition.
GalleryPage.toast_error_exhibition: An error occurred during exhibition operation.
GalleryPage.alert_dialog_withdraw_description: This photo will be removed from the public Exhibition. It will continue to appear in your gallery.
GalleryPage.dialog_not_analyzed_desc: This photo has only been uploaded, it has not been scanned by AI.
GalleryPage.empty_gallery_desc: No photos matching this filter yet.

GroupsPage.title: My Groups
GroupsPage.create_limit_tooltip: You have reached the group creation limit ({ownedCount}/{limit}).
GroupsPage.create_dialog_description: Start your community by giving your group a name and purpose.
GroupsPage.form_error_name_min: Group name must be at least 3 characters.

GroupsPage.form_error_description_max: Description can be up to 200 characters.

GroupsPage.join_dialog_description: Enter the 6-digit invitation code for the group you want to join.
GroupsPage.form_error_code_format: Code must consist of 6 digits only.
GroupsPage.toast_join_not_found_description: No group found with this code. Please check the code.
GroupsPage.toast_join_already_member_description: You are already a member of '{name}' group. Redirecting...
GroupsPage.toast_join_fail_description: You could not join the group. The group may be full or there was an error.
GroupsPage.card_owner_tooltip: You are the owner of this group.
GroupsPage.no_groups_title: You Are Not Yet a Member of Any Group
GroupsPage.no_groups_description: Start your own community by creating a new group or get an invitation from a friend.
GroupsPage.create_tooltip_no_access: You must reach the Viewner level to create a group.
GroupsPage.no_description: There is no description for this group.
GroupsPage.form_visibility_public_desc: Anyone can see photos without joining (Parents, Locals, etc.)
GroupsPage.form_visibility_platform_desc: Only registered platform members can see the group and gallery
GroupsPage.form_visibility_private_desc: Group is hidden from lists, only members can see content

GroupDetailPage.invite_member_description: Enter the email address of the user you want to invite to the group.

GroupDetailPage.toast_add_member_no_permission: You do not have permission to add members.

GroupDetailPage.group_not_found_error: An error occurred while loading this group.
GroupDetailPage.group_not_found_no_permission: This group may not exist or you may not have permission to view it.
GroupDetailPage.invite_dialog_description: You can invite new members to your group using this QR code, the link, or a 6-digit code.
GroupDetailPage.wip_placeholder: A group-specific exhibition and assignment area will be here soon.
GroupDetailPage.remove_dialog_title: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
GroupDetailPage.remove_dialog_description: {memberName} will be permanently removed from the group.
GroupDetailPage.toast_remove_success: {memberName} has been removed from the group.
GroupDetailPage.toast_remove_error: An error occurred while removing the member.
GroupDetailPage.delete_group_description: This action cannot be undone. The group and all its content will be permanently deleted.

GroupDetailPage.delete_group_dialog_description: This action will permanently delete the group and all data in the group.
GroupDetailPage.toast_delete_error: An error occurred while deleting the group.
GroupDetailPage.competitions_no_competitions_description: The group owner can create a new competition from this tab.
GroupDetailPage.create_competition_dialog_description: Set up a new competition for your group members.
GroupDetailPage.form_placeholder_comp_description: Short information about competition rules and objectives.
GroupDetailPage.form_error_date: The end date must be after the start date.
GroupDetailPage.toast_comp_create_error: An error occurred while creating the competition.
GroupDetailPage.assignment_success_description: Your work has been successfully saved by the system.
GroupDetailPage.challenge_upload_desc: Upload your best photo for the competition subject.
GroupDetailPage.challenge_confirmation_desc: Your work has been queued for jury review.
GroupDetailPage.toast_approved_success: Work successfully added to the exhibition.

LumaMentorPage.title: Luma Mentor
LumaMentorPage.subtitle: I will prepare a strategic roadmap that will take your vision to mastery.
LumaMentorPage.start_card_desc: Luma is ready to prepare a special strategy for you by scanning your photos.
LumaMentorPage.toast_no_access_desc: Vexer level and Master package are required for strategic analysis.
LumaMentorPage.toast_data_insufficient_desc: You must have at least 3 analyzed photos for Luma to analyze your development.

JoinGroupPage.status_processing_description: Your request to join the group is being processed...

PricingPage.page_description: Purchase Auro to take your skills to the next level and unlock your artistic vision.
PricingPage.toast_redirecting_description: This is a simulation. In a real application, you would have been redirected to iyzico.
PricingPage.toast_purchase_success_description: {auro} Auro has been added to your account.

PricingPage.beta_info_desc: During the beta process, you can use the Pix' automatically assigned to your account. The actual payment infrastructure will be activated with the launch.

ProfilePage.admin_total_users_description: Total number of registered users in the system.
ProfilePage.admin_edit_exhibition_description: Manage photos in the general exhibition hall.
ProfilePage.developer_tools_description: Change your user level for testing purposes.
